LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MATRIXX INITIATIVES, INC., ZICAM, LLC, ROBERT S. DAVIDSON (INCORRECTLY SUED AS "STEVEN DAVIDSON"), DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. COUNSEL FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHICH PRODUCT(S) PLAINTIFFS WERE EXPOSED TO AND HOW AND WHERE THEY WERE INJURED BY THE PRODUCT(S). PLAINTIFFS SHALL FILE THEIR AFFIDAVIT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1780(D) WITH THEIR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MATRIXX INITIATIVES, INC., ZICAM, LLC, and, ROBERT S. DAVIDSON, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (Due to the unavailability of Judge Woolard, all calendar matters this date originating out of Department 302, were called from Department 301, by Judge Busch.)No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, on January 26, 2010 Plaintiff filed a second amended complaint. (302/CWW) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Continued To Feb-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MATRIXX INITIATIVES, INC., ZICAM, LLC, ROBERT S. DAVIDSON (incorrectly sued as "Steven Davidson"), DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Krista L. Cosner, Esq. of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP, (415) 591-7570, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Counsel failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege which product(s) plaintiffs were exposed to and how and where they were injured by the product(s). Plaintiffs shall file their affidavit pursuant to Civil Code section 1780(d) with their first amended complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
